testcase.name: test_addition_fail
testcase.failure:
self = <test_math_operations.TestMathOperations testMethod=test_addition_fail>
def test_addition_fail(self): # Intentionally failing: 2 + 3 should be 5, not 6 > self.assertEqual(add(2, 3), 6) E AssertionError: 5 != 6
test_math_operations.py:30: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_complex_operation_fail
testcase.failure:
self = <test_math_operations.TestMathOperations testMethod=test_complex_operation_fail>
def test_complex_operation_fail(self): # Intentionally failing: expecting the result to be 12 instead of 11 result = add(multiply(2, 3), subtract(10, divide(20, 4))) > self.assertEqual(result, 12) E AssertionError: 11.0 != 12
test_math_operations.py:71: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_multiplication_fail
testcase.failure:
self = <test_math_operations.TestMathOperations testMethod=test_multiplication_fail>
def test_multiplication_fail(self): # Intentionally failing: 3 * 4 should be 12, not 11 > self.assertEqual(multiply(3, 4), 11) E AssertionError: 12 != 11
test_math_operations.py:46: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_subtraction_fail
testcase.failure:
self = <test_math_operations.TestMathOperations testMethod=test_subtraction_fail>
def test_subtraction_fail(self): # Intentionally failing: 10 - 5 should be 5, not 4 > self.assertEqual(subtract(10, 5), 4) E AssertionError: 5 != 4
test_math_operations.py:38: AssertionError
